summary: This is a brief promotional post announcing that an excerpt from 'Weapons of Math Destruction' has been published in The Guardian. O'Neil shares her excitement about the UK publicity push and promotes an upcoming London book tour event at the How To: Academy. She also links to a Scientific American review of her book by Evelyn Lamb.
key_points: Guardian published an excerpt of Weapons of Math Destruction with accompanying graphics
Random House UK publicity team organized the UK promotional campaign
Author will speak at How To: Academy in London on September 27th
Scientific American published a review by Evelyn Lamb
money_quotes: How algorithms rule our working lives
key_insight: This post is purely promotional, announcing media coverage and events for the Weapons of Math Destruction book launch rather than offering substantive analysis.
